rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §276.010 criminalizes buying/selling balloting materials. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 276.010. UNLAWFUL BUYING AND SELLING OF BALLOTING MATERIALS. (a) A person commits an offense if the person buys, offers to buy, sells, or offers to sell an official ballot, official ballot envelope, official carrier envelope, signed application for an early voting mail ballot, or any other original election record.
_note: No relationship between proposed homestead exemption increase and election balloting materials statute.
